core_mechanism: inter-arrival / first-passage time statistics of an ensemble of independent random walkers diffusing on a directed network, with the arrival-time distribution deviating from Poisson depending on the graph's degree structure
brief_reason: The abstract maps message propagation to multiple random walkers on directed networks and evaluates the inter-arrival time distribution of successive walkers reaching a target node, finding non-Poissonian, topology-dependent (Poissonian vs. scale-free) arrival statistics.
